creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi, thanks for reporting.

I already committed this update to ports tree head:

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=9ab5849723df8bcc94da833ba823326b9a08f5e5

Binary package should be available in a few days.

Usually routine updates without security related fixes are not merged to quarterly.

The old 2.53.5 and 2.53.7 version are wire compatible though, so they can be mixed and used together.
